---
title: ""
title-block: false
page-layout: full
body-classes: home
---

:::: {.home-hero}

::: {.home-intro}

# Patrick A. Molligo

Applied microeconomist specializing in labor economics, economic history, and the economics of education.

I study education, workforce development, and public policy, with particular attention to vocational training and the G.I. Bill.

<div class="home-fields">
  Labor Economics · Economic History · Economics of Education
</div>

<div class="home-links">

<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=etF9XScAAAAJ" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i>
Scholar
</a>

<a href="https://github.com/pmolligo" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<i class="bi bi-github"></i>
GitHub
</a>

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/patrick-molligo" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
LinkedIn
</a>

<a href="mailto:pmolligo@gmail.com">
<i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i>
Email
</a>

</div>

:::

::: {.home-photo}

![](images/headshot.jpg){fig-alt="Portrait of Patrick A. Molligo"}

:::

::::
